interface AgentkitClient {
    fetch: typeof fetch;
    createHeader(extension: AgentkitExtension): Promise<string>;
}
declare function createAgentkitClient(options: CreateAgentkitClientOptions): AgentkitClient;

interface AgentKitStorage {
    /**
     * Atomically increment usage only if the current count is below the limit.
     * Returns `true` if the increment was performed, `false` if the limit was already reached.
     *
     * Implementations MUST perform the check and increment as a single atomic operation
     * (e.g. a database transaction with row-level locking) to prevent TOCTOU race conditions.
     */
    tryIncrementUsage(endpoint: string, humanId: string, limit: number): Promise<boolean>;
    hasUsedNonce?(nonce: string): Promise<boolean>;
    recordNonce?(nonce: string): Promise<void>;
}
declare class InMemoryAgentKitStorage implements AgentKitStorage {
    private usage;
    private nonces;
    tryIncrementUsage(endpoint: string, humanId: string, limit: number): Promise<boolean>;
    hasUsedNonce(nonce: string): Promise<boolean>;
    recordNonce(nonce: string): Promise<void>;
}

// src/agent-book.ts
import { toHex } from "viem";
import { worldchain } from "viem/chains";
var AGENT_BOOK_ADDRESS = "0xA23aB2712eA7BBa896930544C7d6636a96b944dA";
var AGENT_BOOK_ABI = [
  {
    inputs: [{ internalType: "address", name: "", type: "address" }],
    name: "lookupHuman",
    outputs: [{ internalType: "uint256", name: "", type: "uint256" }],
    stateMutability: "view",
    type: "function"
  }
];
function createAgentBookVerifier(options = {}) {
  return {
    /**
     * Look up the anonymous human identifier for an agent's wallet address.
     * Always resolves against the AgentBook deployment on World Chain, regardless
     * of which chain the agent's signature was produced on.
     */
    async lookupHuman(address) {
      const contractAddress = options.contractAddress ?? AGENT_BOOK_ADDRESS;
      const client = options.client ?? getPublicClient(worldchain.id, options.rpcUrl);
      try {
        const humanId = await client.readContract({
          address: contractAddress,
          abi: AGENT_BOOK_ABI,
          functionName: "lookupHuman",
          args: [address]
        });
        if (humanId === 0n) return null;
        return toHex(humanId);
      } catch {
        return null;
      }
    }
  };
}
export {
  AGENTKIT,
  AgentkitPayloadSchema,
  SOLANA_DEVNET,
  SOLANA_MAINNET,
  SOLANA_TESTNET,
  buildAgentkitSchema,
  createAgentBookVerifier,
  decodeBase58,
  encodeBase58,
  extractEVMChainId,
  extractSolanaChainReference,
  formatSIWEMessage,
  formatSIWSMessage,
  parseAgentkitHeader,
  validateAgentkitMessage,
  verifyAgentkitSignature,
  verifyEVMSignature,
  verifySolanaSignature
};
